Owen & Yilin

October 15, 2026

A love story in five rooms.

01

How we met

McGill University Library, 2021

"She asked me where Brazil was."

— Owen

"Loud Chinese guy."

— Yilin
02

First date

The nervous energy of two people discovering each other. A café, two coffees, and a conversation that lasted until they were asked to leave.

03

Falling in love

"I knew when..."

— Owen

"I knew when..."

— Yilin
04

The invitation

Together with their families

Owen & Yilin

request the pleasure of your company at their wedding celebration

Saturday, October 15, 2026

at five o'clock in the evening

123 Wedding Lane, City
